testcase.name: Security scan: PSADT.ClientServer.Client.exe.config

error.message: [CRITICAL] dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string at line 6: Dynamic credential detection: Hex High Entropy String

testcase.error: Rule: dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: High entropy string or pattern detected (Hex High Entropy String) Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault or SCCM Task Sequence Variable.

failure.message: [HIGH] hemspect_xml_password_attribute at line 6: HemSpect: XML/Config attribute with credential value

testcase.failure: Rule: hemspect_xml_password_attribute Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Token="b03f****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

testcase.failure: Rule: hemspect_xml_password_attribute Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Token="b03f****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

failure.message: [HIGH] privilege_escalation_api at line 476: Malware indicator: privilege_escalation_api

testcase.failure: Rule: privilege_escalation_api Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 7.5 MITRE: T1068 CWE: CWE-506 Match: SeDebugPrivilege Remediation: BLOCK PACKAGE - IMMEDIATE SECURITY INVESTIGATION REQUIRED

testcase.name: Security scan: test_passwords.ps1

error.message: [CRITICAL] hardcoded_credential at line 8: Hardcoded password literal found in script variable

testcase.error: Rule: hardcoded_credential Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: $password = 'MySuperSecretPassword123!' Remediation: Move secrets to SCCM TS Variable (mark Private) or Azure Key Vault

error.message: [CRITICAL] secure_string_plaintext at line 14: SecureString constructed from plaintext with -AsPlainText -Force

testcase.error: Rule: secure_string_plaintext Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 8.1 MITRE: T1552 CWE: CWE-312 Match: ConvertTo-SecureString "P@ssw0rd!2024" -AsPlainText -Force Remediation: Remove -AsPlainText -Force; use DPAPI or managed credential store

failure.message: [HIGH] credential_creation at line 14: PSCredential object constructed inline - potential secret exposure

testcase.failure: Rule: credential_creation Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 7.5 MITRE: T1078 CWE: CWE-798 Match: $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential Remediation: Replace inline PSCredential with SCCM TS Variables or MSA

failure.message: [HIGH] registry_manipulation at line 39: Modification of HKLM registry hive via Set-/New-ItemProperty

testcase.failure: Rule: registry_manipulation Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 6.5 MITRE: T1112 CWE: CWE-1104 Match: Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM Remediation: Document justification; restrict via AppLocker and GPO

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 8: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: password = 'MySuperSecretPassword123!' Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 11: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Password = "SqlServer@dmin2024" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 23: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Password = "EmailP@ss789!" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 24: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: pass = 'SmtpSecret#456' Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 36: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: password = 'TXlTdXBlclNlY3JldFBhc3N3b3JkMTIzIQ==' Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 42: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Password = "MultiLine#Secret99" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] secure_string_plaintext at line 14: SecureString from plaintext — password fully exposed in source

testcase.error: Rule: secure_string_plaintext Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: ConvertTo-SecureString "P@ssw0rd!2024" -AsPlainText -Force Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] connection_string_password at line 20: Database connection string with embedded password

testcase.error: Rule: connection_string_password Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: connectionString = "Server=myServer;Database=myDB;User Id=sa;Password=Str0ngP@ss!2024" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] api_key at line 17: API key or access token embedded in source

testcase.error: Rule: api_key Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: apiKey = "sk-proj-abc123def456ghi789jkl012mno345pqr" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] aws_access_key at line 27: AWS access key ID detected

testcase.error: Rule: aws_access_key Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] azure_storage_key at line 30: Azure Storage connection string with account key

testcase.error: Rule: azure_storage_key Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=myaccount;AccountKey= Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] registry_password at line 39: Password stored in Windows registry

testcase.error: Rule: registry_password Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\MyApp" -Name "ServicePassword" -Value "Registr7P@ssword!" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] dynamic_secret_base64_high_entropy_string at line 33: Dynamic credential detection: Base64 High Entropy String

testcase.error: Rule: dynamic_secret_base64_high_entropy_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: High entropy string or pattern detected (Base64 High Entropy String) Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault or SCCM Task Sequence Variable.

error.message: [CRITICAL] hemspect_sql_conn_string at line 20: HemSpect: SQL Connection String with embedded password

testcase.error: Rule: hemspect_sql_conn_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Server=myServer;Database=myDB;User Id=sa;Password=Str0****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

failure.message: [HIGH] hemspect_xml_password_attribute at line 11: HemSpect: XML/Config attribute with credential value

testcase.failure: Rule: hemspect_xml_password_attribute Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Password = "SqlS****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

error.message: [CRITICAL] hemspect_ps_securestring_plaintext at line 14: HemSpect: ConvertTo-SecureString with plaintext input

testcase.error: Rule: hemspect_ps_securestring_plaintext Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: ConvertTo-SecureString "P@ssw0rd!2024" -AsPlainText Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

failure.message: [HIGH] hemspect_smtp_credentials at line 22: HemSpect: SMTP/Mail credentials

testcase.failure:
Rule: hemspect_smtp_credentials Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: SMTP password --- $smtpPassword = "Emai****" $smtp_pass = 'SmtpSecret#456'
# --- Test Case 7: AWS Access Key (fake Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

testcase.name: Security scan: test_false_positives.ps1

error.message: [CRITICAL] hardcoded_credential at line 17: Hardcoded password literal found in script variable

testcase.error: Rule: hardcoded_credential Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: $password = '<YOUR_PASSWORD_HERE>' Remediation: Move secrets to SCCM TS Variable (mark Private) or Azure Key Vault

error.message: [CRITICAL] hardcoded_credential at line 18: Hardcoded password literal found in script variable

testcase.error: Rule: hardcoded_credential Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: $password = 'PLACEHOLDER' Remediation: Move secrets to SCCM TS Variable (mark Private) or Azure Key Vault

testcase.error: Rule: dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: High entropy string or pattern detected (Hex High Entropy String) Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault or SCCM Task Sequence Variable.
